_comment: Ghost Voice Intelligence — Demo generation config. Single source of truth for all A/B demo pairs.

elevenlabs._comment: Set ELEVENLABS_API_KEY env var, then run: node scripts/generate-demos.mjs --provider elevenlabs

openai._comment: Set OPENAI_API_KEY env var, then run: node scripts/generate-demos.mjs --provider openai

custom._comment: Place your voice recording at scripts/source-voices/my-voice.wav, then run: node scripts/generate-demos.mjs --provider custom
custom.instructions: The script will use this recording as the voice seed for both before/after pairs. Before: provider default settings applied. After: routed through Ghost prosody layer settings.

demos.label: AI Sales Agent
demos.script: Hi, I noticed your team recently expanded into enterprise accounts. I wanted to reach out about how Ghost Voice Intelligence has helped similar sales teams increase warm reply rates by 30%, just by making their AI agent sound less robotic. Would you have 15 minutes this week to see what that looks like for your stack?

demos.label: Customer Support
demos.script: I completely understand how frustrating that must be, and I want to make sure we get this resolved for you today. Let me pull up your account and take a look at what happened. I do see the issue right here, and I can fix this for you now. Is there anything else that has been bothering you about the experience?

demos.label: Voice Assistant
demos.script: Sure, I can help with that. I will book the meeting for Thursday at 2 PM, send the agenda to both attendees, and add a prep reminder for the morning of. Just to confirm before I finalize — should I include the project brief, or just the agenda?
